variants.modifierDescription: Enemies can deal enhanced puncture damage. Finishing damage is not resisted.
Only melee weapons may be used in this mission, any other weapon type is not allowed, and will be removed automatically if equipped.
The tileset has a fire hazard. Warframe health is halved. Meltdown Iminent.

activeChallenges.desc: Polarize a Weapon, Companion, or Warframe (not in Simulacrum).
activeChallenges.title: Polarized

activeChallenges.desc: Defeat the Orowyrm in Steel Path
activeChallenges.title: Elite Beast Slayer

activeChallenges.desc: Complete 8 Zones of Elite Sanctuary Onslaught
